showcase_home.farm_desc: Visit our high-quality organic plum farm in My Tho, Tien Giang!
showcase_home.hero_desc_1: Beautiful moments at the plum farm
showcase_home.hero_desc_2: Golden ripe plum garden in summer
showcase_home.history_intro: From the early days of reclamation, our family's garden has gone through a journey of more than two decades, associated with the change of soil and the enthusiasm of true gardeners.
showcase_home.history_step_1_desc: The story begins in 2003, when the first apple roots were planted. Then, the family decided to switch to planting star apple - a tree that provides shade and high economic value at the time. In 2006, the plum tree officially appeared in the garden, initially just intercropped roots under the star apple canopy.
showcase_home.history_step_2_desc_1: The year 2014 marked an important decision: We realized that the perennial star apple trees had grown too high, making it difficult and dangerous to harvest and care for. With the goal of optimizing yield, the family decided to chop down the star apple trees to focus entirely on the plum trees.
showcase_home.history_step_2_desc_2: Since then, plums have become the main source of income and the pride of the garden. To make the most of the land area and create a diverse ecosystem, we also intercropped kumquat and pineapple. This "take short to feed long" model not only helps retain moisture for the soil but also provides a stable source of extra income year-round.
showcase_home.history_step_3_desc: Not stopping at cultivating fruit trees, in mid-2025, my father pioneered deploying a frog farming model. This is a strategic step to:
showcase_home.history_step_3_point_1_desc: Combine the existing garden ditch to raise frogs.
showcase_home.history_step_3_point_2_desc: Diversify the supply of products to the market besides fresh fruit.
showcase_home.history_step_3_point_3_desc: Utilize agricultural by-products and create a natural organic fertilizer source from frog waste to feed back to the plum roots.
showcase_home.share_thoughts: Share your thoughts about the farm...
showcase_home.visit_address: Dong Hoa, My Tho City, Tien Giang, Vietnam

showcase_policy.title: Information Security Policy
showcase_policy.intro_1: Green Acres Farm always respects customer privacy, which is why we are committed to protecting your personal information.
showcase_policy.intro_2: In this document, "personal information" includes name, address, email, phone number, or any other personal information you provide, or any information about you collected in accordance with applicable laws. We hope this document helps you understand what personal information Green Acres collects and how we use it later.
showcase_policy.intro_3: When you visit and use the website (including registering for online services), we understand that you fully agree to the terms of this policy.
showcase_policy.sec1_desc: All content you see on the website is to serve your informational needs and help you choose a service. Therefore, you may use the website without providing any personal information. However, in some cases related to service registration, we may ask you to provide personal information.
showcase_policy.sec2_desc_1: When you provide necessary information, we will use it to meet your request, or we may contact you via letter, email, message, or phone; or in accordance with applicable laws, Green Acres may use these means to introduce you to new products, services, or promotions from Green Acres. By providing information to us through this website, you understand and agree to the collection, use, and disclosure of the aforementioned personal information for some purposes specified on this page.
showcase_policy.sec2_desc_2: You fully agree and accept that the personal information you provide when using the website may be kept at Green Acres' headquarters or branches, and may be stored on existing or future servers for the purpose of operating and developing the website as well as Green Acres' services.
showcase_policy.sec2_desc_3: If you order a product, request a service, or send feedback on the website, we may contact you for additional information necessary to process or complete your order or request. However, we will not provide this information to a third party without your permission, unless required by applicable law or necessary to process the order.
showcase_policy.sec3_desc: We may use other entities to provide products or services to you. We also need to share your personal information with these entities so they can fulfill your request. These entities are not allowed to use your personal information for other purposes, and we require them to comply with security regulations when providing services.
showcase_policy.sec4_desc_1: Sometimes, information may be placed on your computer to help us upgrade the website or improve service quality for you. This information is usually known as "cookies," which many websites use today. "Cookies" are pieces of information stored on your computer's hard drive or browser, not on the website. They allow the collection of certain information about your computer, such as IP address, operating system, browser mode, and addresses of related websites.
showcase_policy.sec4_desc_2: If you do not want to receive these cookies, or want to be notified when these cookies are placed, you can set your browser to do this if your browser supports it. Please note that if you disable cookies, you may not be able to access or use some features on the website properly. We do not intentionally restrict your use in this situation; this is merely a limitation in the programming and construction of the website.
showcase_policy.sec5_desc_1: When programming the website, we may set reasonable commercial rules to prevent unauthorized access and improper use of the personal information you have sent to Green Acres through the use of this website. If this website supports online transactions, an industry-standard technology called SSL (Secure Sockets Layer) is applied to protect security and safety during data transmission.
showcase_policy.sec5_desc_2: Because there are always risks associated with providing personal data, whether in person, by phone, over the internet, or other technical means; and no technical system is absolutely secure or resistant to all "hackers" and "tampers," Green Acres always strives to take appropriate precautions tailored to the nature of the information to prevent and minimize risks when you use this website.
showcase_policy.sec6_desc: When you register for a service, the email address you provide will be used as a communication tool with you. First, please ensure you provide a valid email address that you use throughout your use of the service. We may send confidential information via email or receive your support requests. In case you no longer use the provided email, you must inform us of this change. To protect you, Green Acres may temporarily stop processing requests through the email you provided if we detect fraud or abnormal activity until we contact you to confirm.
showcase_policy.sec7_desc: Green Acres will actively or at your request add, correct, or delete inaccurate, incomplete, or un-updated personal data when you are still affiliated with our operations.
showcase_policy.sec8_desc: Green Acres refuses to serve individuals who are Minors (as defined by local laws where you reside) who do not have the right to purchase or seek to use under other legal bases on this website without the consent of a parent or legal guardian, unless applicable local law permits it.
showcase_policy.sec9_desc: This website may contain links to other websites provided for introduction or supplementary relevant information for your reference. Green Acres is not responsible for the content or actions of any other website.
showcase_policy.sec10_desc: Green Acres may sporadically change this regulation, including adding, removing part of the content, or temporarily suspending the website without notice. However, if this regulation is changed in a way that may be detrimental to you, Green Acres will try to notify you of the change via the email you provided or directly on the homepage.

showcase_terms.title: Terms of Service
showcase_terms.sec1_desc: By accessing, registering, or using any features of the Green Acres management and service system, you confirm that you have read, understood, and fully agree to comply with the terms and conditions outlined here. If you do not agree to any part of these terms, please stop using our services immediately.
showcase_terms.sec2_desc_1: When creating an account at Green Acres, you commit to providing accurate, complete, and updated information. You are solely responsible for keeping your password secure and for all activities that occur under your account.
showcase_terms.sec2_desc_2: You must notify us immediately if you discover any unauthorized access or security breaches. We are not liable for any loss or damage arising from your failure to comply with this security regulation.
showcase_terms.sec3_desc: To ensure a transparent and safe agricultural management environment, you commit to NOT performing the following actions:
showcase_terms.sec3_li_1: Intentionally entering false or fraudulent information regarding yields, seasons, or financial figures.
showcase_terms.sec3_li_2: Attempting to interfere with, sabotage the system (hack), spam, or spread malicious code.
showcase_terms.sec3_li_3: Using the service for any illegal purposes or violating applicable laws.
showcase_terms.sec4_desc_1: All content including but not limited to: logos, source code, interface designs, images, text, and other digital assets on the system are the exclusive property of Green Acres.
showcase_terms.sec4_desc_2: Any copying, citation, or commercial use of these assets without our written consent is considered copyright infringement and will be handled in accordance with the law.
showcase_terms.sec5_desc: Green Acres endeavors to maintain stable services. However, we are not responsible for service interruptions due to force majeure such as network incidents, natural disasters, or technical errors beyond our control. We reserve the right to temporarily suspend services for maintenance or system upgrades at any time.
